name: getYoutube
description: Fetch and process YouTube video transcripts, or search YouTube. For mode='transcript': fetches the transcript and either dumps it (short) or summarizes/answers questions (long). For mode='search': searches YouTube via the Data API. Always fetch fresh — never reuse transcript content from previous calls. If a previous call returned an error, retry. Returns structured JSON only.
policyHint: When the user asks about a YouTube video, wants a transcript, or asks to search YouTube, use this tool. Do not answer YouTube questions from memory.

mode.description: transcript = fetch and dump or summarize; search = YouTube search via Data API.

metaOnly.description: If true, return only video metadata without fetching the transcript (requires valid googleApiKey).

videoUrl.description: Full YouTube URL or 11-character video ID. Required when mode='transcript'.

userPrompt.description: Optional: if provided, runs a focused QA over the transcript instead of a generic summary.
